title: thlasidia integrifolia
intro: Thlaspidia integrifolia, also known as the Thlaspidia, is a species of plant in the family of Malpighiaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Australia, where it is found in the eastern and southern regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Thlaspidia integrifolia is prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea and tincture, to take advantage of its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function.
